name: openclaw-manus
description: First-pass modular monolith scaffold for evolving OpenClaw into a Manus-grade task system.

scripts.test: OPENCLAW_DB_MODE=inmemory OPENCLAW_AGENT_MODE=mock OPENCLAW_TOOL_MODE=mock OPENCLAW_BROWSER_MODE=mock npm run build && OPENCLAW_DB_MODE=inmemory OPENCLAW_AGENT_MODE=mock OPENCLAW_TOOL_MODE=mock OPENCLAW_BROWSER_MODE=mock node --test dist/packages/agents/test/*.test.js dist/packages/tools/test/*.test.js dist/packages/policy/test/*.test.js dist/packages/orchestrator/test/*.test.js dist/apps/gateway/test/*.test.js
